input.request_text: Replicate the research paper 'Bbox': The BBOX-ADAPTER approach for adapting black-box LLMs has been reproduced completely. This involves 9 major phases and 421 total subtasks. The workflow includes: Algorithm 1 (Online Adaptation) has been implemented correctly.; The evaluation environments and datasets have been set up for GPT-3.5 Turbo and Mixtral-8x7B.; The baseline models have been implemented and/or configured for evaluations..
